feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
feed.subtitle: ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: popup with continue and cancel buttons
entry.content:
Hello,

We have an app developed using restful abap. In the object page we have few address fields. On click of a custom action called 'Validate address' we would like to validate the address ( we have an API that does this) and show the corrected / suggested address in a popup with 'Continue' and 'Cancel' buttons. Where user will select 'Continue' to accept the suggested address or 'Cancel' . Wondering if this kind of popup is possible using RAP. If not,  any suggestions for a workaround would be greatly appreciated. thanks

entry.title: SAP UI5 Reuse Change Document Component OData V4
entry.content:
Hello,

I'd like to reuse change document component in my SAP UI5 application.

I performed the adjustments of the manifest.json file as described here and there:

 

 

 

But during the object page loading wrong request is triggered by this component:

MyEntityObject(ID=00134acb-16df-1edf-94e0-17eecb0b123f,key1='1234',key2='0123456',key3=’abcdefg’,IsActiveEntity=true)/ID?sap-client=100

This request is similar to the one that is used for entity selection (except “/ID”).

While I suppose the C_ChangeDocument service should be called.

The UI of the component seems to correct.

Could someone tell what I’m doing wrong?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: GRID TITLE IN OOPS ALV
entry.content:
• when u execute factory method program we can’t able to see customize grid title, we can customize title by using set_list_header method in cl_salv_table.
    • create a basic program in SE38 code as follows.
"INSTANCE FOR FACTORY
DATA : o_alv type REF TO cl_salv_table,
       lo_columns TYPE REF TO cl_salv_columns_table,
       lo_column TYPE REF TO cl_salv_column_table,
       LO_FUNCTIONS TYPE REF TO cl_salv_functions_list,
       ls_color TYPE lvc_s_colo.
START-OF-SELECTION.
"FETCH DATA FROM EKPO
select * FROM ekpo INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_ekpo) UP TO 20 ROWS.
"DISPLAY ALV
  TRY.
  CALL METHOD CL_SALV_TABLE=>FACTORY
    IMPORTING
      R_SALV_TABLE   = o_alv
    CHANGING

      T_TABLE        = lt_ekpo.
   CATCH CX_SALV_MSG .
  ENDTRY.

CALL METHOD o_alv->GET_DISPLAY_SETTINGS
  RECEIVING
    VALUE =   data(gr_disp).  "ALV Settings for Display

gr_disp->SET_STRIPED_PATTERN( VALUE = ABAP_TRUE ).
gr_disp->SET_LIST_HEADER( VALUE =  'PURCHASE ORDER REPORT' ).

CALL METHOD o_alv->DISPLAY.

entry.title: Routing Operation View CDS
entry.content:
Hi expert

I want to create custom cds view with Routing Operation View data

Is any data source for this view to create custom CDS view

 

Please help me.

Thanks and best Regards

Daroi

entry.title: RAP-App Object Page using Visual Studio code:layout issue titles twice after deployment launchpad
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am developing a RAP-App with a List Report and Object Page using Visual Studio code.
After deploying the app I have the issue that the layout of the deployed Version is different from the preview that was shown in VS Code.

Unfortunately the titles are shown twice and with a huge gap in between.
Does anyone know how that happens and what I need to do to make sure the deployed Version Matches the preview and does not show the title twice ?

Screenshot Preview:

 

 

Screenshot deployed:

Thanks for your help

entry.title: How to use Content-ID to reference the ETag in an OData Batch Request?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm trying to send a batch request following the OData V4 Guideline: https://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/odata-v4.01-part1-protocol.html#sec_ReferencinganETag

My request body and the response is:

In my batch request, I tried to read an entity with Content-ID:1 and use this Content-ID as the referenced Etag in the If-Match part for the PATCH request. The response said my second request's syntax is wrong.

entry.title: SAP RAP - Determination of on modify is not triggered during change
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

currently I´m trying to implement a determination with on modify into my RAP Application. So far so good, but the defined ABAP Method is only called while pressing save.

As far as I´ve understood the documentation and blog post, "on modify" will instantly being triggered, as soon as the definition is fulfilled. The handling is happening in the transactional buffer - So it should work without pressing save, right?

 

 

  determination detCreateValues on modify { create; }
  determination onChangeEQUNR on modify { field equnr; }

 

 

I´ve also implemented SideEffects in my UI for the field, but the ABAP Method is still not triggered

Can somehelp give me a solution for it? Maybe I understood something wrong


Notes:
HANA2020 Release
Non Draft Application

entry.title: RAP-Create option: Can all fields including key can be shown in one form ?
entry.content:
Hi All,

In RAP managed scenario, Create option will show the key fields first to enter the input and then show other fields to create. Is there any way we can show all fields in one form?

Thanks,

Liya

entry.title: Using CDS ABAP code exit with unlimited character length
entry.content:
Hello community,

I used the ABAP code exit feature as described e.g. here. I add the following two lines to my cds view:

      @ObjectModel.virtualElementCalculatedBy: 'ABAP:My_Class'
      cast( '' as abap.char( 256 )) as ExitResults

This works fine. However, the result is restricted to 256 characters. Is it somehow possible to get rid of this limitation and have a unlimited length for the result calculated?

Thanks for your suggestions.

entry.title: RAP- Value help based on another field input
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement to show value help for 2 fields which are dependent. Second field value help should be based on the first field.

For example, Material and suppliers. Based on the material selected, value help should be  shown for supplier and vice-versa if possible.

I have tried additional binding with usage: #FILTER  but it is not helping to get the results. Parameter CDS Views are not supported in the value help. Please guide me with any possibilities for the solution.

Thanks,

Liya

entry.title: Triggering side effect on press of Delete button
entry.content:
We have a requirement in our RAP based unmanaged application.
When we delete the Child entity entry itself (in draft) using the standard delete action on UI, is there a way to trigger the side effects?
Because we want to control the enabling/disabling of the child's Create button on click of Delete.

In a Nutshell, I delete the child entity, can Parent entity be affected with Side effects? (Before we click save).

entry.title: Custom Entity does not display all line items
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I have created a custom entity based on Maintenance order i_maintenanceordertp and Operation I_Maintenanceorderoperationtp to get the measuring point based.

when i execute the custom entity i get only 20 records i am not able to get all the records in display 

i have written following code 

DATA(top) = CONV i( io_request->get_paging( )->get_page_size( ) ).

DATA(lv_skip) = CONV i( io_request->get_paging( )->get_offset( ) ).

DATA(lv_max_rec) = top + lv_skip.

 

and using lv_max_rec in my select

SELECT *

FROM i_maintenanceordertp WITH PRIVILEGED ACCESS

WHERE (lv_conditions)

ORDER BY maintenanceorder

INTO TABLE @@DATAlt_mo) UP TO @lv_max_rec ROWS. " OFFSET @LV_skip.

Please help and guide me at your earliest to get all the rows displayed in the output.

Thanks for your help and quick guidance.  
Nitin

entry.title: Colon is missing in time format when using the tstmp_to_tims () function in CDS views.
entry.content:
Hello,

I am using below code to fetch the time from timestamp, and it is in case condition.

tstmp_to_tims( test.timestamp,
               abap_system_timezone( $session.client,'NULL' ),
                       $session.client,
                    'NULL' )
                      end  as field_time.

I am getting time in field_time but it is coming as "152334" and i want as "15:23:34".

Please let me know how we can add colon ? how i can get in mentioned format.

entry.title: C_ABAPD_2309 - SAP Certified Associate - Back End Developer ABAP Cloud.
entry.content: Hi All, I would also like to ask everyone, if you can recommend some additional free study materials to better prepare for C_ABAPD_2309 - SAP Certified Associate - Back End Developer ABAP Cloud. ABAP Development SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment

entry.title: ABAP CDS Parameter filter Value Help results with entity field
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I'm trying to develop a RAP application with an action to change the status that has as an input parameter to specify the status.

The parameter abstract entity is like that:

define abstract entity ZD_ChangeStatusP
{

  @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{
      entity: {
          name: 'ZI_DocumentStatus',
          element: 'Status'
      },
      
      additionalBinding: [{
          localElement: '',
          element: 'DocumentType',
          usage: #RESULT
      }]
  }]
  Status : zdocument_status;

}

I'd like to filter the results with the "DocumenType" value from the entity.

Is it possible?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: How to get the multiple include option for filter fields in fiori UI created via custom entity CDS?
entry.content:
I have created a Fiori UI5 via BAS using a custom CDS entity as a data source.

My UI screen looks like below with few selection items for filters and a list report to display.

Now when i click on the F4 help request on any of the input fields, im not able to see any option for selection other than "EQUALS" such as "BETWEEN" or "EXCLUDE", which by default comes when a normal CDS view is exposed as a service.

I have created a v4 service exposing this custom entity.

Even in my BAS annotation.xml the filter restrictions have all the required include options. 

@Andre_Fischer Need you expertise here to help me with a solution. Thank you in advance

entry.title: RAP - Create POST Service with standard BO call
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I have a requirement I have been working with for the last couple of weeks but I'm stuck and don't know how to achieve what I need.

I need to be able to expose a service to call as POST with a deep body (header, items, partners, etc) and in the service I need to call I_SalesOrderTP using MODIFY ENTITIES to create a sales order with the payload recieved.

Can't use I_SalesOrderTP API directly since I need the option to do some pre and post processing with a lot of custom code related to the business.

I've tried creating behavior implementations from CDS and custom entities, tried unamanged and managed with unmanaged save, tried using static actions with deep parameters and deep result but was not able to make it work.

Is there a way I can create a service NOT from a CDS/BEHAVIOR? Do I need to go with HTTP service?

Any help will be highly appreciated!

Thanks and regards,

entry.title: Which website is the best to learn a SAPUI5 javascript language?
entry.content:
Which website is the best to learn a detailed SAPUI5 javascript language?

I already check this Step 1: Ready... - Documentation - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK (ondemand.com) but I can't find a detailed documentation of javascript for SAPUI5 it only gives me a sample. syntax and result

The documentation im looking for is a documentation like ABAP / Java where it explains the purpose of every keyword/syntax

entry.title: CDS view for all stock movements with Opening and Closing Stock Quantity
entry.content:
I am looking for a CDS view / Solution which captures all stock movements in a given period for quantity, opening stock and closing stock quantity and value.

Could you Please anyone help here

entry.title: How to build a RAP application to upload BAPI program in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

As classical ABAP, We have requirement to bulk data upload using excel for some transactional data using BAPIs. The same thing how we can achieve in S/4 HANA via developing RAP application only.
